title: unique case with --assert falsely failing with multiple matches

features.name: unique case with wide packed array case expression
features.description: Code should include a unique case statement with a wide packed array type (128+ bits) as the case expression, with multiple case items matching the same value

features.name: assertion check on VlWide type boolean conversion
features.description: Code should include a wide packed array type used in a boolean context such as an if condition, where the type's operator bool() returns a pointer instead of element-wise evaluation
